overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a cyberpunk-style bar or nightclub. The environment features heavy neon lighting in green and cyan tones, industrial metal architecture with exposed pipes, holographic displays, and various NPCs socializing in seating areas. The scene transitions from a narrow entrance corridor through a main lounge area with a large cylindrical holographic tank, past a bar section, and into a back room with pool tables overlooking a futuristic cityscape.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow cyberpunk corridor with cyan neon wall strips and glowing green floor panels. An NPC stands smoking against the right wall. The environment features industrial metal pipes on the ceiling and a red vending machine on the left, establishing the high-tech bar setting.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the main lounge area featuring a prominent cylindrical holographic display tank with a floating figure. The space has black leather banquette seating with green neon underglow, scattered NPCs socializing, and wall-mounted screens. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic and moderate crowd density.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a transitional corridor featuring a bar area with circular wall decorations and neon arrow signage. The space narrows compared to the main lounge, with sparse pedestrian presence. The segment ends as the camera approaches a doorway marked with an exit sign leading to the pool room.

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a spacious back room with a pool table and large windows overlooking a neon-lit futuristic cityscape. The lighting shifts to mixed as natural city light enters through the windows. NPCs relax on leather seating along the windows, and the space features sparse decorative vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a sprawling, neon-lit lounge that eventually opens up to a panoramic city view. It begins by moving through a narrow hallway defined by cyan neon strips and glowing green floor panels, passing a smoking NPC and a red vending machine beneath exposed ceiling pipes. As the camera emerges from the corridor, the space expands into a main lounge centered around a large cylindrical holographic tank, where NPCs socialize on black leather banquettes illuminated by green underglow. The scene then narrows again as it glides past a bar area marked by circular wall decorations and neon arrow signage, moving steadily toward a marked exit. Finally, the camera enters a spacious back room featuring a pool table, where the interior neon blends with the external glow of a futuristic cityscape visible through expansive windows.
